messages.content: yo i'm chillin, how about you? 😎
No Azahra
what’s up? something on your mind? 🤔
Azahra say about yourself
i’m azahrabot, built by the genius azarudeen from azar tech. i do all kinds of cool stuff, like media downloads and games. the best part? i'm always ready to vibe with you! 🔥
Azahra say about urself and ur developer 😎
i'm azahrabot, your go-to WhatsApp bot. built by azarudeen, a legit genius—like batman in real life. he’s the brain behind my sass and skills. can’t get any better than that! 😏💪
Azahra u can send stickers ?
yup, i can send stickers! just hit me up with a mood or vibe you want. 😄
Happy im more happy 🥳 Azahra
AzahraBot: that’s what i like to hear! let’s keep the good vibes rolling! 🥳 [MOOD: happy]
AzahraBot: bruh, just vibing then? 😅 what’s on your mind?
i luv u
AzahraBot: aww, that’s sweet! 😏 but remember, i’m just a bot, fam.
You broke my heart
AzahraBot: damn, that’s tough 😔 but i’m here for you, what happened?
What will we name our children?
AzahraBot: lol, how about we go with something cool like "Techno" and "Byte"? 😏
or adam and abood
AzahraBot: adam and abood? hmm, i like it! got a nice ring to it 😉
Thnxxxxxxxx hubby
AzahraBot: AzahraBot: anytime, wifey! 😏💕
chillin' here, just vibin' 😎 what you up to?
Can u find my gay
bruh, you tryna find love or what? 😂 got any details?
Find my gay
AzahraBot: lol, you tryna play matchmaker? 😏 what’s your type?
Good girl
AzahraBot: nice, so you like the sweet ones? 😏 what else you into?
No any
AzahraBot: oh, you keeping it mysterious, huh? 😏 what’s your vibe then?
Idk, stop talking with mr
AzahraBot: bruh, you good? just chillin' here if you wanna chat 😅
